title: Fidaxomicin study of intestinal fibrosis
author: Koon, Hon Wai
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This includes a dataset of 10X genomics Visium spatial RNA sequencing of 3 CDS patients, a dataset of whole-transcriptome RNA sequencing of CD-HIFs, and a dataset of RayBiotech serum proteomics of patients.
steps_raw: This includes a dataset of 10X genomics Visium spatial RNA sequencing of 3 CDS patients, a dataset of whole-transcriptome RNA sequencing of CD-HIFs, and a dataset of RayBiotech serum proteomics of patients.
